overall.description: Static first-person view from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showing a luxury cyberpunk apartment bedroom at night. The scene features a messy bed, floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a rainy neon-lit city, and a holographic advertising display cycling through various futuristic advertisements and colorful visuals.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury cyberpunk bedroom with holographic entertainment system

events.description: holographic display changes from 'POMP OVERKILL' text to walking figure advertisement
display transitions to 'HELLO DARKNESS' and 'WAKE THE DEAD' text advertisements
display changes to colorful abstract geometric advertisement with 'BIG' text

agents.ego_description: standing still in the bedroom observing the holographic advertisements cycling on the display

entered.detail: unmade bed with white and grey sheets in the foreground
large window wall revealing rainy night cityscape with neon lights
distinctive ribbed wooden ceiling with wave pattern
large holographic display unit projecting floating advertisements
furniture piece with leopard print throw visible beside the bed
neon-lit city buildings visible through the rain-streaked windows

segments.scene_description: Static view of a cyberpunk luxury bedroom at night, with a messy bed in the foreground and floor-to-ceiling windows revealing a rainy neon-lit city. A holographic display on the right cycles through various futuristic advertisements including 'POMP OVERKILL' and abstract visuals while the room remains still.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury cyberpunk bedroom with holographic entertainment system

events.description: holographic display changes to car racing advertisement showing sports vehicles
display transitions to statistical data showing '31.1%' with red text
display changes to pink cartoon character advertisement

agents.ego_description: continuing to observe the changing holographic advertisements in the static bedroom scene

segments.scene_description: The scene continues in the same bedroom with the holographic display now showing car racing imagery and statistical data. The rainy cityscape remains visible through the windows with cyan and pink neon lights illuminating the room's interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury cyberpunk bedroom with holographic entertainment system

events.description: display transitions to 'Just Ads' branding with colorful backgrounds
display shows 'Night City' advertisement with urban imagery
display changes to underwater scene featuring a large shark

agents.ego_description: standing still watching the final sequence of holographic advertisements cycle through

segments.scene_description: The bedroom scene persists with the holographic display cycling through cartoon characters, 'Just Ads' branding, and underwater shark scenes. The ambient lighting from the advertisements reflects off the room's surfaces while the rainy night continues outside the windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective of a luxury cyberpunk bedroom as the interior atmosphere shifts through a sequence of vibrant holographic advertisements. It begins with a view of a messy bed and floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a rainy, neon-lit city, while a holographic display on the right cycles through abstract visuals and POMP OVERKILL branding. As the display shifts, the room is bathed in cyan and pink light reflecting from the cityscape and new imagery of car racing and statistical data. The scene then evolves as the hologram transitions through cartoon characters, Just Ads branding, and underwater shark scenes, causing the ambient lighting to continuously ripple across the room's surfaces. Finally, the shot lingers on this interplay of shifting digital colors against the backdrop of the persistent rainy night outside.
